metadata.note: V-T3 pact: cart validates items against the catalog (01 §1 'cart: item validation against catalog') and revalidates on menu.updated. This pins the read contract cart depends on: the menu payload must carry item_id + price (Money: integer minor units + currency) + availability so cart can price and gate a line item. File-based broker, verified against the REAL merchant-catalog booted by ci/pact-verify.sh, which pre-seeds mer_01hpactcatalog0000000000000 with one item (provider state). item_id is non-deterministic so it is asserted present via shape (empty object pins the key path only through the pinned scalars); price + available are pinned.

interactions.description: read a menu item's price + availability to validate a cart line
